title: tagetes foetidissima
intro: Tagetes foetidissima, also known as Stinkweed or Stinking Marigold, is a plant species native to South America, characterized by its strong-smelling foliage and yellow or orange flowers. The medicinal properties of Tagetes foetidissima include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive problems, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Tagetes foetidissima can be found in tea, tincture, and infusion forms, and are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
